assumptions: The intragroup dividend receivable is denominated in a foreign currency.
The question concerns consolidated financial statements.

approaches.label: IAS 21 foreign currency accounting
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: The context includes the default accounting for exchange differences on foreign currency monetary items and intragroup monetary balances in consolidation under IAS 21.

approaches.label: IFRS 9 hedge accounting
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: The question asks whether the foreign exchange risk can be formally documented in a hedging relationship, and IFRS 9 contains the hedge accounting model for eligible hedged items and hedging instruments.

approaches.label: Net investment hedge accounting
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: The context specifically includes the hedge accounting model for foreign currency risk on a net investment in a foreign operation under IFRS 9, IAS 21 and IFRIC 16.
